text:
BBC One commentator JJ Chambers was almost left speechless bySimon Biles' incredible performance on the balance beam on Sunday morning during the 2024 ParisOlympicsgymnastics qualifier.

After watching the 4 feet 8-inch American powerhouse own the beam and execute an impressive array of flips, splits and a stellar dismount, theBBCstar issued a four-word response to viewers.

The Invictus Games medallist shared with his co-star, former Olympian, Jeanette Kwakye: "She's the ultimate athlete."

As Simone was sitting in her crystal-embellished leotard nervously waiting for her first score of the day, she soon discovered her "huge" mark of 14.733 and started beaming.

JJ exclaimed: "It's the highest beam score that we have seen today and those scores are just going to keep on coming because Simone Biles is back where she belongs."

READ MORE:Inside Simone Biles' family life as Netflix series explores USA gymnast's past



Former sprinter Jeanette warned JJ to "catch your breath" as he was grinning from ear to ear over Simone's comeback success.

After taking a breath he said: "There are three more pieces of apparatus for Simone to compete in but we are going to switch that to Olympics Extra which is over on BBC iPlayer right now."

Viewers flocked to social media to comment on Simone's performance, with one fan writing: " Excellent and incredible display from Simon Biles. What a start!!! #OlympicGames."

Don't miss:Simone Biles' husband was 'scared' when he first met gymnast

Don't miss:Simone Biles fans are keen to know if there will be a part 2

Don't miss:Simone Biles shares emotional look at 'forbidden Olympic closet' at her home



A second penned: "Simone Biles is built differently! #ParisOlympics2024 #Gymnastics."

Another remarked: " Simone Biles…take a bow- what a way to come back! #Olympic #OlympicGames."

Another shared: " Simone Biles has just done a fixed bar exercise that is bordering on perfection."

Lolly added: "Just watched the amazing Simon Biles on the beam! She is INCREDIBLE!"

Jackie gushed with heart emojis attached to her post: "I t’s so beautiful watching Simon Biles."

The Olympic Games can be watched on BBC iPlayer and BBC One until August 11.

title: BBC Olympics commentator's four-word response to Simone Biles' 2024 comeback | TV & Radio | Showbiz & TV | Express.co.uk
author: Rebecca Jones
description: Olympics fans across the globe have been waiting for US gymnast Simone Biles to make her comeback to the sport after dropping out of the Tokyo Olympics - and the 27-year-old did not disappoint.
